name: Caramel-Nut Corn
recipeIngredient: 3 cups walnut or pecan halves - OR - unblanched whole almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the popcorn and nuts between 2 ungreased rectangular pans, each measuring 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
2. Cook brown sugar, margarine, corn syrup, and salt over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until bubbly around edges.
3. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes; remove from heat.
4. Stir in baking soda until foamy.
5. Pour the mixture over the popcorn and nuts, stirring until the corn is well coated.
6. Bake uncovered at 200 degrees F (93 degrees C) in the oven, stirring every 15 minutes for 1 hour.
Caramel Corn: Increase popped popcorn to 15 cups; omit nuts.
Source: Betty Crocker's Cookbook
Typed for you by Karen Mintzias
